title: Tin Gods
writer: Paul Dickey, James Shelley Hamilton, William Anthony McGuire
actors: Thomas Meighan, Renée Adorée, Aileen Pringle
plot: An engineer in New York is unhappily married to a politically ambitious wife. When their son dies due to his wife's neglect, he deserts her and goes to South America to help build a bridge. But he loses interest in life, starts dr...
